caption: Table 105. Document revision history
rows: Removed NAND from supported memories on cover page. Added ADC 3 impacting: Cover page Section 2: Description. Table 2: STM32L475xx family device features and peripheral counts. Table 5: Functionalities depending on the working mode. Section 3.15.1: Temperature sensor. Section 3.15.3: VBAT battery voltage monitoring. Table 16: STM32L475xx pin definitions. Section 2: Description. Updated Section 3.26: Universal synchronous/asynchronous receiver transmitter (USART). Updated Section 3.27: Low-power universal asynchronous receiver transmitter (LPUART). Added Table 53: Wakeup time using USART/LPUART. Updated Table 65: EMS characteristics. Updated Table 66: EMI characteristics.

Replaced reference manual reference RM0395 by RM0351 in the whole document. Replaced DFSDM by DFSDM1 and DFSDMx by DFSDM1_FLTx in the whole document. Updated Section 3.11: Clocks and startup. Updated Section 3.14: Interrupts and events. Added Table 10: DFSDM1 implementation. Added IRTIM in Table 6: STM32L475xx peripherals interconnect matrix, Section 3.23.5: Infrared interface (IRTIM). Updated baudrate in Section 3.26: Universal synchronous/asynchronous receiver transmitter (USART). Updated introduction of Section 6.2: Absolute maximum ratings. Updated TBD in Table 26: Embedded internal voltage reference. Updated Section 6.3.5: Supply current characteristics. Updated Table 44: Wakeup time using USART/LPUART. Updated footnote of Table 59: I/O current injection susceptibility.

Updated Table 60: I/O static characteristics. Added footnote to Figure 22: Recommended NRST pin protection. Added Section 6.3.16: Extended interrupt and event controller input (EXTI) characteristics. Updated Table 65: Analog switches booster characteristics. Updated Section 6.3.18: Analog-to-Digital converter characteristics. Updated Section 6.3.19: Digital-to-Analog converter characteristics. Added Ibias parameter on Table 75: COMP characteristics. Updated Section : USB OTG full speed (FS) characteristics. Added Section 6.3.29: SWPMI characteristics. Updated Section 7: Package information.

Updated DAC terminology in all the document for clarification: single DAC instance (= DAC1) with 2 output channels. Updated Table 72: DAC characteristics. Added power up/down sequence requirements in Section 3.9.1: Power supply schemes. Added Figure 3: Power-up/down sequence. Updated Section 6.3.2: Operating conditions at power- up / power-down. Updated Table 60: I/O static characteristics. Updated Table 72: DAC characteristics.
Updated energy benchmarks on cover page, see Bullet Updated I/Os definition on cover page see Bullet. Updated Figure 4: Clock tree. Updated Vhyst in Table 75: COMP characteristics.
